channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Astronomers detect first atmosphere on rocky world in habitable zone
item.description: Astronomers have confirmed the first atmosphere around a rocky planet in another star's habitable zone. The planet, LHS 1140 b, revealed its atmosphere.

item.title: Ancient DNA reveals chilling secret at China's 4,000-year-old Shimao city
item.description: Ancient DNA from China's vast 4,000-year-old Shimao settlement is revealing how one of East Asia's earliest complex societies was organized. Researchers.

item.title: Scientists discover unknown bacteria in one of the ocean's most elusive whales
item.description: Decades of pygmy sperm whale strandings revealed three new types of Helicobacter bacteria in the animals.

item.title: Hidden 'switch-off' signal could predict solar storms seven years in advance
item.description: A newly discovered turning point in the Sun's 11-year cycle may allow scientists to predict solar activity years earlier.
